title.ja: 流沢 - マインクラフト

description: The most recent Minecraft world I have been building in my free time, usually when I want to satiate my craving for creation. I explore different architectural and fantastical styles, aiming to make it the ideal place I would live in.

My first attempt at a calm, cozy vlog on my trip in Hakone as well as some bits from Kamakura. When I have more time, I hope to edit more videos that document joyous memories and share them with others.

title.ja: リンブルック・ヴォーグ

description: A simple cover design made for a page in my high school's planner when I was experimenting with typography and graphic design. Made with Adobe Photoshop, Lightroom, and Illustrator.
